sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# The white dots moved! After LEFT, white dots shifted left by 3 columns. After RIGHT, they shifted back right by 3 columns.
# So arrow keys control the white dot pattern. The pattern is a shape made of 5 white dots inside the black shape.
# Let me check the current state and see what the goal might be trying to match the charcoal shape or yellow shape on the right.

# Let me look at the shapes more carefully
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

# The white dots form of white dots
white_dots = []
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        white_dots.append(n['boundary'][0])  # [row, col]

# form of charcoal shape
charcoal = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c':
        charcoal = n['boundary']

print("White dots:", white_dots)
print("Charcoal shape boundary:", charcoal)

# Yellow shape boundary")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] > 10:
        print("Yellow shape boundary:", n['boundary']

# The white dots form a goal might be to match the white dot pattern to the charcoal shape or yellow shape
# Let me try to move the white dots to match the charcoal shape
# The charcoal shape looks like an inverted L or T shape
# Let me try UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT move up
action(['UP'])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"world_model": "64x64 board with two blue panels separated by sky blue strip. Left panel has black shape with 5 white dots (player). Right panel has charcoal shape and yellow shape. Yellow strip on right edge, black bottom strip. White dots are bottom strip. White dots might be player or targets.",
"goal_model": "Unknown - need to explore what actions do",
"action_model": "UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT, SPACE, MOUSE, ACTION7 available",
"recent_findings": "LEFT moves white dots left by 3 columns. RIGHT moves them back. The white dots are controlled by arrow keys.",
"open_questions": "What do arrow keys do? Are white dots the player? What is the goal?",
"current_plan": "Probe with arrow keys to see what moves to understand mechanics",
"cross_level_notes": "None"
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
